summary: The diff implements a comprehensive FRIDAY AI assistant web app with frontend React/TypeScript components and a Motoko backend. Most requirements appear to be addressed, but the diff is heavily truncated (24 added files omitted), making complete verification impossible. Key observations: the backend signature for saveMessage differs from the spec (takes a Message object rather than individual parameters), and getHistory is named getConversationHistory with different parameters. Several requirements appear implemented but cannot be fully confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: saveMessage(role: Text, content: Text, timestamp: Int) : async () stores a message; getHistory(limit: Nat) : async [Message] returns the last N messages
missing_requirements.reason: The backend exposes saveMessage(message: Message.Message) taking a composite object rather than individual (role, content, timestamp) parameters. The retrieval function is getConversationHistory(page, pageSize) with pagination params, not getHistory(limit: Nat). The Message type also uses 'sender' instead of 'role'. These signatures deviate from the spec's AC.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal for initial user onboarding with name entry on first login
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a profile setup modal or first-time onboarding flow. REQ-10 mentions a display name input in settings, but not a mandatory setup modal blocking access.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinAuthorization and AccessControl role-based permission system in the backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies principal-scoped data isolation but does not specify a role-based access control system with user and admin roles. The spec requires only Internet Identity principal scoping.

hallucinated_features.description: saveCallerUserProfile / getCallerUserProfile / getUserProfile backend functions for a separate UserProfile type
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request's REQ-8 specifies savePreferences with a UserPreferences type (language, voiceSettings, name). A separate UserProfile type with principalId and dedicated profile CRUD functions was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: WEATHER, REMINDER, TRANSLATION, and JOKE as distinct IntentCategory values beyond the six specified
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-6 specifies exactly 6 intent categories: System Control, File Management, Web Search, Communication, Content Creation, and General Conversation. The IntentBadge component adds WEATHER, REMINDER, TRANSLATION, and JOKE as additional categories beyond the spec.
